visual_prompts.master_style: Minimalist black and white line art, Japanese language textbook illustration style, clean monochrome vector art, thick clean outlines, no shading, white background, simple character design, instructional clipart style, high contrast, no text

options.prompt: A minimalist black and white line art illustration of two onigiri rice balls on a simple plate, in the style of Japanese language textbook drawings. Simple clean outlines, monochrome, white background, no shading, high contrast.

A minimalist black and white line art illustration of three apples grouped together, in the style of Japanese language textbook drawings. Simple clean outlines, monochrome, white background, no shading, high contrast.

A minimalist black and white line art illustration of two pet bottles of tea, in the style of Japanese language textbook drawings. Simple clean outlines, monochrome, white background, no shading, high contrast.

A minimalist black and white line art illustration of two onigiri rice balls and two pet bottles of tea together on a tray, in the style of Japanese language textbook drawings. Simple clean outlines, monochrome, white background, no shading, high contrast.

tts_script.text: おとこのひとと おんなのひとが はなしています。ふたりは なにを かいますか。
あしたの ピクニック、なにが ありますか。
おにぎりと おちゃが あります。
くだものは ありますか。
くだものは ありません。りんごを かいましょう。
いいですね。りんごを かいましょう。
ふたりは なにを かいますか。

transcription.intro: おとこのひとと おんなのひとが はなしています。ふたりは なにを かいますか。

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: あしたの ピクニック、なにが ありますか。

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: おにぎりと おちゃが あります。

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: くだものは ありますか。

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: くだものは ありません。りんごを かいましょう。

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: いいですね。りんごを かいましょう。

transcription.question: ふたりは なにを かいますか。

en.intro: A man and a woman are talking. What will they buy?

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: What do we have for tomorrow's picnic?

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: We have rice balls and tea.

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: We don't have fruit. Let's buy apples.

en.question: What will they buy?

tr.intro: Bir erkek ve bir kadin konusuyor. Ikisi ne satin alacak?
tr.question: Ikisi ne satin alacak?

logic.tr: Dogru cevap: Elma (Secenek 1). Diyalogda erkek piknige ne hazirlandi diye soruyor. Kadin onigiri ve cay oldugunu soyluyor. Erkek meyve var mi diye sorunca kadin meyve olmadigini belirtiyor ve elma almaya karar veriyorlar. Tuzaklar: Secenek 0 (onigiri) ve Secenek 2 (cay) zaten sahip olduklari seyler. Secenek 3 (onigiri + cay) her ikisini de gosteriyor ama bunlar almaya gerek olmayan seyler.
logic.en: Correct answer: Apples (Option 1). In the dialogue, the man asks what they have for the picnic. The woman says they have rice balls and tea. When the man asks about fruit, the woman says they don't have any and suggests buying apples. Traps: Option 0 (rice balls) and Option 2 (tea) are items they already have. Option 3 (rice balls + tea) shows both items they already own — none of these need to be purchased.
